text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Say, Yaeno and Bamboo. 
Do you like spicy foods…?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I can handle the heat, yeah. Why do you ask?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Well the thing is, I accidentally bought 
a bunch of really spicy curry. I can really 
only go for the sweeter varieties, so…

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I see where this is going. Bamboo?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm not great at handling spicy stuff, but I do 
like it. I'm up for the challenge!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Can't handle it, but like it all the same? 
What's that all about?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I just get real fired up on the inside when I eat 
spicy stuff! Makes me feel alive!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I see! It's like how carrots taste better 
after a bout of hard work!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(Feeling alive? And why bring up carrots? 
I'm not sure what these two are on about…)
